## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Tests / CI
- [ ] Other

## Validation

- [ ] Ran `dotnet test`
- [ ] Ran `dotnet build`
- [ ] Tested relevant CLI command
- [ ] Tested relevant MCP behavior
- [ ] Updated documentation if behavior changed

## Notes for reviewers

Mention anything that needs extra attention.

## Agent/context notes

If an AI coding agent was used, briefly note what context or tools guided the change.
